summary: V31.0 Pure 7-Pillar Drill-Down Navigation - ALL 7 TEST CRITERIA PASSED. Sovereign Hub shows 7 pillars with NO header/footer/floating widgets. Pillar accordion expansion works correctly. Navigation to sub-pages works. Back to Hub button present and functional on all tested pages. NO fixed blocking elements found on any page.

minor.issue: AxiosError on fetch (non-blocking, console warning only)
AxiosError on fetch (non-blocking, console warning only)

critical_code_review_comments: SovereignHub.js V31.0: Pure accordion implementation with 7 pillars - clean and functional
BackToHub.js: Fixed top-left back button with data-testid='back-to-hub' - correctly implemented
App.js: ALL chrome removed (no header, no footer, no EmergencyShutOff, no MANIFEST_BAR) - verified
AnimatedRoutes: BackToHub component correctly injected for all non-hub pages via showBackBtn logic
test_credentials: Not required for this test (unauthenticated testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: V31.0 complete UI rebuild verified. All 7 pillars functional: Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish & Heal, Explore, Sage AI Coach, Sovereign Council. Accordion expansion works. Navigation to sub-pages works. Back to Hub button present on all non-hub pages. NO fixed blocking elements on any page (except the expected back-to-hub button).

test_1_sovereign_hub_7_pillars.details: All 7 pillars found with correct data-testid attributes. NO header bar, NO footer bar, NO floating widgets.

test_2_practice_pillar_expansion.details: Practice pillar expands showing Breathwork, Meditation, Yoga, Mudras, Mantras, Light Therapy. Click Breathwork → navigates to /breathing.

test_3_sanctuary_soundscapes.details: Sanctuary pillar expands showing Soundscapes. Click Soundscapes → navigates to /soundscapes. Page shows 9 sound cards with sliders.

test_4_soundscapes_back_to_hub.details: /soundscapes has Back to Hub button (data-testid=back-to-hub). Click it → returns to /sovereign-hub.

test_5_oracle_page.details: /oracle has Back to Hub button. Page content loads with Draw Cards visible.

test_6_mantras_page.details: /mantras has Back to Hub button. Category filters (7 found) and mantra cards (23 found) render correctly.

test_7_no_fixed_blocking_elements.details: Verified on 5 pages (/sovereign-hub, /breathing, /soundscapes, /oracle, /mantras). Zero elements with position:fixed, pointer-events:auto, opacity>0.1, width>20px (except expected back-to-hub button).
